_comment: CANONICAL — server overwrites model output for this block if present on disk
skin_realism: visible pores, natural skin texture, slight uneven skin tone, tiny blemishes, fine peach fuzz, no airbrushing, no plastic skin, no over-smoothing
hair_realism: individual stray hairs, flyaways, natural strand separation, slight frizz, realistic hair shine (not glossy CGI)
fabric_realism: visible fabric weave, natural wrinkles, lint, occasional pet hair or dust on clothing, realistic fabric drape
environment_realism: minor everyday clutter, small dust particles in light beams, slight smudges on surfaces, realistic shadow imperfections, lived-in feel
photo_realism: natural smartphone sensor noise, mild ISO grain, slight motion shake, imperfect focus, real white balance shifts, no professional retouching, no studio polish
color_grading: natural unedited colors, slight warmth or coolness depending on light source, no Instagram filter, no HDR oversaturation
imperfection_level: subtle but present — should feel like a real photo taken on a phone, not a render
